# v1.2.0

This update is mostly a (MUCH needed) frontend cleanup and improvements update.  It turns out spamming random css until it worked is not a long-term viable strategy. This update doesn't really brings anything new, but paves the way for actual features in the future.

## Changes

- Major frontend facelift, things should look better, more lined up, behave better on mobile / half screen, more consistent and more compact as well. Most notably:
  - Font has been changed to Nunito across the site (rather than having 3 different ones)
  - The progress update stuff have been reworked to be hopefully more intuitive and usable, it now auto-deducts costs as well.
    - Incidentally this closes [#15](https://github.com/Kenivia/Honing-Forecast/issues/15), thanks for the report!
  - Tap instructions should be less ambiguous
  - Inputs are no longer like 2 pixels off
  - Added a bunch of hoverable question mark explainers
  - Added crosses and ticks to clarify the instructions
  - Added indicator for pity (ArtistCaught by [nyaffie](https://x.com/nyaffie), or does the copyright belong to AGS now? idk)
  - A bunch of stuff no longer overflows incorrectly, a lot of things now expand / shrink slightly based on screen size.
- Updated the Guide page to be a lot more informative
- Added Comparison button to override recommended strategies with simple one
